D:\software\CMake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\DeepDungeonTests.dir/objects.a
E:\C++\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\DeepDungeonTests.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\DeepDungeonTests.dir\objects1.rsp
E:\C++\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\DeepDungeonTests.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o DeepDungeonTests.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libDeepDungeonTests.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\DeepDungeonTests.dir\linkLibs.rsp
